Gaussian Open Systems¶

A simulation framework for Gaussian continuous-variable open quantum systems.

This library supports construction, evolution, and analysis of multimode Gaussian states under quadratic Hamiltonians and dissipative channels, including finite-memory environments via pseudomode embedding.
